Description: Fixing the character floating above the chair, and shifting the layout higher and slightly to the left.
Instruction: In VRMCharacter.tsx, update the VRM scene position Y offset to -1.38 for the 'about' mode so the character sits properly on the chair. Description: Fix syntax error in lerp caused by mangled replacement.

            -0.5,
            sitBlend
         )
